dict.string: ArchFusion BIM uses the camera for AR site capture and design-in-place workflows.
ArchFusion BIM records site coordinates to geo-reference landmarks and BIM exports.
ArchFusion BIM saves site photos and export sheets to your library.
ArchFusion BIM attaches site photos to observations and issues.
ArchFusion BIM uses motion data for AR site capture and design-in-place.
